menuItems.name: Adana Kebab
menuItems.description: Spicy minced meat kebab served with lavash and grilled vegetables

menuItems.name: Iskender Kebab
menuItems.description: Doner slices over pita with tomato sauce, yogurt, and butter

menuItems.name: Lahmacun
menuItems.description: Thin crispy flatbread topped with minced meat and herbs

menuItems.name: Pide with Cheese
menuItems.description: Traditional Turkish pide with melted cheese

menuItems.name: Mixed Pizza
menuItems.description: Mozzarella, sucuk, mushroom, pepper, and olives

menuItems.name: Vegetarian Pizza
menuItems.description: Mozzarella, mushroom, corn, olives, and peppers
